coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-HCHP-2025-3350; Large Risk Rating Plan; Interstate Rating; Final Experience Modification Factor 0.94

positives: Experience modification factor below 1.00 (0.94) indicating better-than-average loss experience
All reported losses are primary with zero excess losses across three policy years
Total incurred losses ($92,945) well below expected losses ($361,806)
concerns: Claim frequency trend: 8 claims in 2021-2022, 6 in 2022-2023, 2 in 2023-2024
Majority of payroll exposure in higher-rated hotel and restaurant classifications
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three years of loss data: 2023-2024: 2 claims, $9,940 incurred; 2022-2023: 6 claims, $26,662 incurred; 2021-2022: 8 claims, $56,343 incurred. Total: 16 claims, $92,945 actual primary losses, $0 excess losses.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC. Risk ID 308382-9453. Interstate Rating under Large Risk plan. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Payroll distributed across four classifications: Class 9052 Hotel All Other Employees ($9,207,271 payroll); Class 9060 Hotel Bellhops/Doorpersons ($1,454,400 payroll); Class 9082 Restaurant NOC ($3,678,800 payroll); Class 8810 Clerical Office Employees NOC ($1,920,000 payroll).
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Actual Primary Losses: $92,945; Actual Excess Losses: $0; Expected Losses: $361,806; Expected Excess Losses: $422,385; Weighting Factor: 0.419; Ballast Value: $29,114. Numerator $367,465 / Denominator $390,920 = Calculated Mod 0.9400.
